_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Turning business problems into data design involves designing data architecture that deals with problems across the enterprise; working across all organisational subject areas and internal and external programmes.
reference_document_element_description: Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topology, data domain structure, integration patterns, and data lifecycle policies.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-K-001 (DG, cosine: 0.573), AI-T-014 (AI, cosine: 0.561).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.5/10 (raw 0.648). Shared vocabulary: [architecture, data, design, enterprise]. DDaT-only terms [across, areas, business, deals, designing, external] vs WIDAI-only terms [document, domain, integration, lifecycle, patterns, platform] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.865, R=0.879). Balanced P/R — the 28-word DDaT element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Turning business problems into data design involves designing data architecture" and "Design and document the enterprise data architecture, including platform topolog" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.666 ≈ STS 0.648 (gap 0.018). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [architecture, data, design, enterprise] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.6%. Shared tokens: [architecture, data, design, enterprise]. DDaT-only: [across, areas, business, deals, designing, external]. WIDAI-only: [document, domain, integration, lifecycle, patterns, platform].
